# Testimonial request template

Use when inviting a customer contact to provide a short quote about SealRun adoption. Keep requests specific to deterministic replay, drift governance, evidence chain auditability, and enterprise controls (tenant isolation, RBAC, OIDC, SIEM / OTel, Cosign / Sigstore attestation, SBOM).

---

**Subject:** Request for SealRun deployment testimonial

Hello `<Name>`,

Thank you for partnering with us on your SealRun deployment. We would like a brief testimonial that speaks to:

1. The challenge you faced before standardizing on deterministic capsules, replay, and drift review.
2. How governance decisions and policy evaluation changed approval workflows for AI or automation outputs.
3. Measurable outcomes—for example release confidence, audit preparation time, or incident response improvements tied to evidence exports and runbooks.

If approved, we can publish as:

- Anonymous quote
- Named quote with title and company
- Short excerpt paired with a full case study (`docs/templates/case-study-template.md`)

We will not claim third-party certification on your behalf; any compliance framing will reference your own assessments and SealRun documentation artifacts (trust center, whitepaper, controls matrix for design reference only).

Thank you for considering this request.

`<Signature>`
